rawOutput.reviewBody: Copilot reviewed changed files and generated actionable comments.

inlineComments.summary: Clarify formal-summary/v2 instead of plain formal summary.

expectedNormalizedArtifacts.purpose: Allow the gate to treat unresolved review threads as blockers and resolved threads as satisfied review evidence.
Optionally connect review-driven commits to the changed-file and evidence summary.
Return unresolved AI comments as compact blockers when they remain open.
